notes: One keystone sorry (`exists_dual`, Silverman III.6.1) gates all `isogDual`-based theorems transitively; the file carefully provides witness-parametric (`exists_dual`-free) alternatives for `degree_dual_of_witness`, `isogDual_comp_self_of_witness`, `dual_add_of_trace_witnesses`, and `dual_add_of_sum_witnesses`.
